name: audit-pack-emit json bundle is byte-identical when run twice with the same commit-sha and generated-at per §2.24 reproducibility
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack-emit.sh" --format json --commit-sha abc123 --generated-at 2026-05-25T00:00:00Z --out-dir out1 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack-emit.sh" --format json --commit-sha abc123 --generated-at 2026-05-25T00:00:00Z --out-dir out2 2>/dev/null && diff out1/abc123-2026-05-25T00:00:00Z/bundle.json out2/abc123-2026-05-25T00:00:00Z/bundle.json && echo ok 1>&2
